name: stream-shogun
description: StreamShōgun — a desktop IPTV player built with Electron, React, and TypeScript. Manage M3U playlists, browse XMLTV programme guides, and watch HLS streams.
author: StreamShōgun Contributors

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/shared build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/core build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/api build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/ui build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/desktop build
scripts.build:win: pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/core build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/ui build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/desktop build:win
scripts.build:mac: pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/core build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/ui build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/desktop build:mac
scripts.build:linux: pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/core build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/ui build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/desktop build:linux
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/shared build && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/core build && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/ui exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/desktop exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @stream-shogun/api exec tsc --noEmit
